components.name: button
components.description: Primary interactive element with multiple variants and sizes.

components.name: input
components.description: Text input field with label, validation, and icon support.

components.name: badge
components.description: Small status indicator with semantic color variants.

components.name: toggle
components.description: Boolean on/off switch with label support.

components.name: select
components.description: Dropdown selection with search, keyboard navigation, and custom options.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Contextual hint displayed on hover or focus.

components.name: card
components.description: Container with variants for elevated, outlined, and filled styles.

components.name: alert
components.description: Contextual feedback messages with semantic types and dismiss support.

components.name: modal
components.description: Overlay dialog with focus trapping, keyboard dismiss, and scroll lock.

components.name: navbar
components.description: Application navigation bar with solid and glass variants.

components.name: table
components.description: Data table with sorting, selection, and density-aware sizing.

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder matching content shape with pulse animation.
